☢ NuclearCraft Guide ☢

Complete crafting reference & item guide for NuclearCraft SMP

⛏ Basic Materials & How to Obtain

Raw Plutonium Fragment

Raw Plutonium Fragment
  • Mine Plutonium Ore deep underground (y = −58 and below, diamond level)
  • Drops 1–3 fragments per ore block · Fortune enchantment increases yield
  • Ore looks similar to coal ore but has a green radioactive glow
☢ Mining plutonium ore without radiation protection will irradiate you. Always wear Hazmat Armor when mining!

Refined Plutonium Ingot

Refined Plutonium Ingot
  • Process Raw Plutonium Fragments inside the Nuclear Smelter (takes 15 seconds each)
  • The main crafting ingredient for all plutonium equipment
  • Cannot be obtained any other way — you must build the Nuclear Smelter first

Radioactive Core & Radioactive Debris

Radioactive Core
Radioactive Debris
  • Radioactive Core — found in dungeon chests, or dropped by irradiated mobs · acts as fuel energy for the Nuclear Forge and Titan Reactor Forge
  • Radioactive Debris — 10% chance to drop when mining with a Plutonium Pickaxe

Healing Petal & Mutated Plants

Healing Petal
Mutated Seed
Mutated Crystal
  • Healing Petal — grows from Mutated Seeds planted on Radioactive Farmland · used in radiation cure recipes
  • Mutated Seed — drops from crops grown on Radioactive Farmland
  • Mutated Crystal — rare drop (8% chance) from Plutonium Titan boss
Use a Plutonium Hoe on grass or dirt to till it into Radioactive Farmland. Crops on it grow 50% faster!

Titan Drops (Plutonium Titan Boss)

Titan Fragment
Titan Core
Reactor Heart
Ancient Reactor Blueprint
Irradiated Heart
  • Titan Fragment & Titan Core — exclusive drops from killing the Plutonium Titan boss
  • Reactor Heart — 10% drop chance · required for MK-III and MK-IV Nuclear Forge upgrades
  • Ancient Reactor Blueprint — 5% drop chance · very rare
  • Boss summon has a 60-minute cooldown per player · 15-second summoning animation
  • Boss scales health with player count: 1-3 players = 5000 HP, up to 10000 HP for 10+ players
☢ The Titan has multiple devastating abilities: Radiation Aura, Titan Slam, Radiation Wave, Reactor Overload (150 radiation burst at 8-block radius), and Nuclear Catastrophe (80 rad, 30-block radius). Full Plutonium or Titan armor is required!

Industrial Fabric & Other Drops

Industrial Fabric
Radiation Drill
  • Industrial Fabric — crafted or obtained from loot · used in Hazmat armor
  • Radiation Drill — obtainable via special craft or loot · wide-area mining tool
  • Plutonium Arrow — found in dungeon loot · irradiates targets on hit

🔧 Crafting the Machines

Nuclear Smelter

Your first machine. Refines Raw Plutonium Fragments into usable Refined Plutonium Ingots. Place it down and right-click to open the GUI.

💎Diamond
🟣Obsidian
💎Diamond
🟣Obsidian
🔥Furnace
🟣Obsidian
💎Diamond
🟣Obsidian
💎Diamond
▶
  • Diamond ×4 — mine at y = −58 or below
  • Obsidian ×4 — pour water on a lava source block, or find in strongholds
  • Furnace ×1 — craft from 8 Cobblestone in a crafting table
☢ The Nuclear Smelter emits radiation in a 3-block radius while processing. Place it away from your base or players without radiation protection!

Nuclear Forge

Upgrades your Plutonium equipment from base to MK-I through MK-IV. Right-click to open the upgrade GUI. Each tier improves damage, durability, speed, and armor.

🟣Obsidian
🪨Ancient Debris
🟣Obsidian
🔨Smithing Table
🟣Obsidian
🪨Ancient Debris
🟣Obsidian
▶
  • Obsidian ×4
  • Ancient Debris ×2 — rare, found in the Nether at y = 8 to 22. Mine with a Diamond or Netherite Pickaxe
  • Refined Plutonium Ingot ×2 — from the Nuclear Smelter
  • Smithing Table ×1 — craft from 2 Iron Ingots + 4 Wood Planks

Titan Reactor Forge

The endgame machine. Crafts all Titan-tier equipment using drops from the Plutonium Titan boss. You must defeat the Wither boss before building this.

💜Crying Obsidian
⭐Nether Star
💜Crying Obsidian
🟣Obsidian
🏮Beacon
🟣Obsidian
⬛Netherite Ingot
⬛Netherite Ingot
⬛Netherite Ingot
▶
  • Crying Obsidian ×2 — found in Ruined Portals or obtained by trading Piglins in the Nether
  • Nether Star ×1 — dropped by the Wither boss (summon with 4 Soul Sand + 3 Wither Skeleton Skulls)
  • Obsidian ×2
  • Beacon ×1 — craft with 1 Nether Star + 3 Obsidian + 5 Glass
  • Netherite Ingot ×3 — combine Netherite Scrap (from smelting Ancient Debris) with Gold Ingots at a Smithing Table
You need to defeat the Wither AND smelt Ancient Debris before building the Titan Reactor Forge. This is late-game content!

🔩 Nuclear Smelter — Processing Recipes

Raw Plutonium Fragment → Refined Plutonium Ingot

▶
  • Processing time: 15 seconds (300 ticks) per fragment
  • Machine must reach 500°C before processing begins
  • Overheats at 1500°C — shuts down for 10 seconds to cool

Accepted Fuels

  • Coal — 100 fuel units (~5 seconds at default settings)
  • Charcoal — 80 units
  • Coal Block — 900 units (most efficient solid fuel)
  • Blaze Rod — 120 units
  • Lava Bucket — 1000 units ⭐ Best fuel source!

🦺 Hazmat Armor

Crafted from Yellow Wool. Each piece worn adds stackable radiation resistance:

  • Helmet — +20% radiation resistance · 2 armor points
  • Chestplate — +30% radiation resistance · 5 armor points
  • Leggings — +20% radiation resistance · 4 armor points
  • Boots — +10% radiation resistance · 2 armor points
  • Full set — 80% total radiation resistance
Hazmat armor is your early-game radiation protection while you gather materials for Plutonium Armor. Cheap to craft but doesn't give full immunity.

🛡 Plutonium Armor

Crafted from Refined Plutonium Ingots. Full set grants 100% environmental radiation immunity plus passive effects per piece:

  • Helmet — Passive Night Vision always active · 4 armor + 3 toughness
  • Chestplate — Passive Regeneration · 9 armor + 3 toughness
  • Leggings — Passive Speed · 7 armor + 3 toughness
  • Boots — Reduced Fall Damage · Knockback Resistance · 4 armor + 3 toughness
Important: Use real Refined Plutonium Ingots from the Nuclear Smelter — not plain Echo Shards. The plugin validates the custom item data and will not give you the armor otherwise.

Plutonium Helmet

▶

Plutonium Chestplate

▶

▶

Plutonium Boots

▶

⛏ Plutonium Tools & Weapons

All plutonium tools and weapons are crafted with Refined Plutonium Ingots (P) and Sticks (S) — same pattern as vanilla tools. They are based on Netherite, so they are fire and lava immune.

Same rule as armor: you must use real Refined Plutonium Ingots from the Nuclear Smelter, not plain Echo Shards.

Plutonium Sword

+10 Attack Damage · ☢ Irradiates enemies on hit (+10 rad/hit) · Critical hit: +20 rad burst to nearby enemies

🪵Stick
▶

Plutonium Axe

+11 Attack Damage · 15% chance on hit: triggers a Radiation Shockwave in a 3-block radius

🪵Stick
🪵Stick
▶

Plutonium Pickaxe

+20% Mining Speed · 10% chance when mining: creates Radioactive Debris as a bonus drop

🪵Stick
🪵Stick
▶

Plutonium Shovel

+20% Mining Speed · 15% chance when digging: creates Radioactive Soil as a bonus drop

🪵Stick
🪵Stick
▶

Plutonium Hoe

Right-click on grass or dirt → converts to Radioactive Farmland. Crops planted on it grow 50% faster and produce Mutated Seeds.

🪵Stick
🪵Stick
▶

Plutonium Arrow

Plutonium Arrow
  • Found in dungeon chests or dropped by Plutonium Titan
  • Fires from any bow · irradiates targets on hit

💊 Radiation Cure Items

Radiation Antidote

Reduces your current radiation level when consumed. Does NOT grant immunity — it only clears existing radiation. Use it when you've already been exposed.

SHAPELESS RECIPE
🍯Honey Bottle
▶
  • Healing Petal ×2 — grow on Radioactive Farmland from Mutated Seeds
  • Honey Bottle ×1 — collect from bee hives or beehives using a Glass Bottle
  • Shapeless recipe — place items in any order in the crafting grid

Radiation Serum

Grants temporary immunity to environmental radiation. Stronger than the Antidote and used proactively before entering hazardous areas.

🌟Gold Nugget
🍎Golden Apple
🌟Gold Nugget
🧪Glass Bottle
▶
  • Healing Petal ×4 — corners of the recipe
  • Radioactive Core ×1 — top-center slot
  • Gold Nugget ×2 — left and right center slots
  • Golden Apple ×1 — center slot
  • Glass Bottle ×1 — bottom-center slot

Radiation Drill

Radiation Drill
  • Wide-area mining tool — mines multiple blocks at once
  • Craftable via special recipe or found in dungeon loot

⚗ Nuclear Forge — Equipment Upgrades

Right-click the placed Nuclear Forge to open the upgrade GUI. Insert the item you want to upgrade, fill the ingot and core slots, then click the tier button.

Each successful upgrade multiplies the item's Damage, Durability, Speed, and Armor stats by the percentage shown. Upgrades stack (MK-I → MK-II → MK-III → MK-IV in order).

MK-IV has only 50% success. On failure there is a 5% chance the item downgrades to MK-III. Prepare plenty of materials before attempting!
☢ MK-IV equipment passively emits a radiation aura — 3-block radius, dealing 25 radiation/tick to nearby hostile mobs and 15 radiation/tick to enemy players.
MK-1
×2 ×1
⚡ 500 energy  ⏱ 3s  🎯 100%
+5% DMG  +5% DUR  +5% SPD  +5% ARM
MK-2
×4 ×2
⚡ 1200 energy  ⏱ 5s  🎯 90%
+10% DMG  +10% DUR  +10% SPD  +10% ARM
MK-3
×8 ×4 + 1× Reactor Heart
⚡ 2500 energy  ⏱ 8s  🎯 75%
+20% DMG  +20% DUR  +20% SPD  +20% ARM
MK-4
×16 ×8 + 2× Reactor Heart
⚡ 5000 energy  ⏱ 12s  🎯 50% ⚠ 5% downgrade on fail
+35% DMG  +35% DUR  +35% SPD  +35% ARM

Reactor Heart required for MK-III and MK-IV — rare 10% drop from the Plutonium Titan boss.

🔮 Titan Armor (Titan Reactor Forge)

All Titan items are crafted inside the Titan Reactor Forge GUI. Open it by right-clicking. Fill the material slots with Titan Fragments + Titan Cores, then start crafting.

Full Titan Set Bonus: +16 Max HP · Full Radiation Immunity · 30% Radiation Reflect · Speed II · Jump Boost II · Auto-Cure every 20 seconds

  • Helmet — Passive Night Vision
  • Chestplate — Passive Regeneration · +4 bonus hearts
  • Leggings — Passive Speed · Knockback Resistance
  • Boots — Passive Jump Boost · Immunity to Fall Damage
Titan armor can be further upgraded in the Titan Reactor Forge (see Titan Upgrades section). Repair with Titan Fragments (20% durability) or Titan Cores (50%).

⚔ Titan Weapons (Titan Reactor Forge)

  • Titan Sword — deals 80 radiation on hit · triggers a radiation wave (4-block radius, 40 rad)
  • Titan Axe — deals 60 radiation on hit · shockwave with 2× knockback in 5-block radius
  • Titan Bow — arrows deal 120 radiation · AoE radiation on impact (3-block, 60 rad) · poisons & marks target with Glowing for 6 seconds
Titan weapons also have a Radiation Aura when held — dealing debuffs (Weakness, Slowness) and 2 damage to nearby mobs every 2 seconds.

🛠 Titan Tools (Titan Reactor Forge)

  • Titan Pickaxe — 2.5× mining speed · 30% chance for double ore drops on every block mined
  • Titan Shovel — mines in a 2-block radius (area of effect digging)
  • Titan Hoe — tills a 3-block radius at once · 40% chance to boost crop growth per use
  • Titan Arrow ×8 — high-radiation projectile · 100% success rate to craft

⬆ Titan Equipment Upgrades

Titan equipment can be further upgraded inside the Titan Reactor Forge GUI using Titan Fragments and Titan Cores. Each tier adds radiation power and attack damage to the item.

Repair: Titan Fragment = +20% durability  |  Titan Core = +50% durability
T-1
×4 ×1
⏱ 20s  🎯 90%
+5 Radiation  +5% Damage

×8 ×2

⏱ 60s  🎯 60%
